ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.

expected_result: User is created successfully and assigned the Admin role.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.

expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Invalid token.
